ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
libnetcdf:
- 4.9.3
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64
name: booz_xform
raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  version: "0.0.9"

package:
  name: "booz_xform"
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/b/booz_xform/booz_xform-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: d650c5fcbd668cbccea50fbfd6e5c507225eb07218acd4991875804aaeb574d7
  patches:
    - fix-msvc-compat.patch
    - fix-win-exe-extension.patch

build:
  number: 2
  script:
    # conda-forge's MSVC activation sets CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM=x64 and
    # CMAKE_GENERATOR_TOOLSET=v143 for the Visual Studio generator. These are
    # incompatible with Ninja and must be cleared.
    - if: win
      then:
        - set CMAKE_GENERATOR=Ninja
        - set "CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM="
        - set "CMAKE_GENERATOR_TOOLSET="
      else: export CMAKE_GENERATOR=Ninja
    - ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
    - ${{ compiler("cxx") }}
    - if: build_platform != host_platform
      then:
        - cross-python_${{ host_platform }}
        - python
    - cmake
    - ninja
  host:
    - python
    - setuptools >=42
    - pybind11 >=2.6.0,<3.0.0
    - pip
    - eigen
    - libnetcdf
    # c.f. https://conda-forge.org/docs/maintainer/knowledge_base/#openmp
    - if: linux
      then: libgomp
    - if: osx
      then: llvm-openmp
    - if: win
      then: vcomp14
  run:
    - python
    - numpy

tests:
  - package_contents:
      bin:
        - xbooz_xform
  - python:
      imports:
        - booz_xform
    pip_check: true

about:
  summary: Transformation to Boozer coordinates
  license: BSD-2-Clause
  license_file: LICENSE
  homepage: https://github.com/hiddenSymmetries/booz_xform
  repository: https://github.com/hiddenSymmetries/booz_xform
  documentation: https://hiddensymmetries.github.io/booz_xform/

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - matthewfeickert
